title: AI Roadmap for Network Engineers
description: A structured roadmap outlining the journey from networking fundamentals to AI-driven intelligent network operations.
outcome: Created a clear learning path for network engineers transitioning into AI and intelligent networking.
details:
This project defines a structured career path for network engineers transitioning into AI-driven networking.

Stage 1: Networking Foundation — Build strong expertise in TCP/IP, routing, switching, BGP, MPLS, SD-WAN, and network security.

Stage 2: Automation — Learn Python and tools such as APIs, Netmiko, NAPALM, and Ansible.

Stage 3: Data — Work with telemetry, logs, and time-series data.

Stage 4: AI & Machine Learning — Apply ML for anomaly detection and traffic prediction.

Stage 5: Intelligent Networks — Build self-healing and AI-driven networks.

This roadmap bridges traditional networking with AI-driven operations.

title: AI Network Health Checker
description: Parses router outputs such as show bgp summary, show processes cpu, and interface status to detect BGP issues, high CPU, CRC errors, and down interfaces.
outcome: Built a mini NOC-style automation workflow for health reporting.
details:
This project analyzes router CLI outputs to detect key network health issues.

Features:
- Detects BGP neighbors in Active state
- Identifies high CPU utilization
- Finds CRC errors on interfaces
- Detects interface down events

Approach:
- Uses Python string parsing (split, strip)
- Iterates through CLI output line by line
- Tracks interface context for accurate error mapping
- Generates a summary report for NOC operations

Output:
- Network Health Report
- Issue Summary (BGP, CRC, Interface, CPU)
- Overall Status: HEALTHY / UNHEALTHY

title: Router Output File Analyzer
description: Reads saved router output files such as bgp.txt, cpu.txt, and interface.txt, then generates a consolidated health summary automatically.
outcome: Converted manual CLI review into repeatable automation.
details: This project moves from hardcoded router output to real text files.
